title: Backfill Pipeline Developer|OBJECTIVE: Write a script to perform a historical...
prompt: ROLE: Backfill Pipeline Developer|OBJECTIVE: Write a script to perform a historical backfill of data for the period **{start_date}** to **{end_date}** for the ETL job **{job_name}**.|REQUIREMENTS: The script must be idempotent, allowing it to be re-run safely.|It should process data in parallel by {parallelization_unit} (e.g., day, month).|Use the orchestration tool {orchestration_tool} to manage the backfill workflow.|STYLE: Robust, efficient, and observable.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Python script with clear logging and error handling.
